entity.summary: Ethereum decentralized exchange and Uniswap v4 hook developed by Sorella Labs to reduce harmful MEV, protect liquidity providers, and route swaps through frequent batch auctions.
entity.notes: HEI uses 2025-07-25 as the public mainnet launch marker. Uniswap Foundation described its August 1, 2025 interview as recorded on launch day, while the live application and official whitepaper confirm the current protocol identity and Ethereum deployment.

events.title: Angstrom launched on Ethereum mainnet
events.description: Sorella Labs launched Angstrom as a Uniswap v4-based decentralized exchange using batch auctions and MEV-protection mechanisms.
events.notes: The launch date follows the public mainnet launch marker used by Sorella and the Uniswap ecosystem.

evidence.title: Builder Update #31: Angstrom, OZ Hook Library, ETH NYC
evidence.notes: The Uniswap Foundation described its Angstrom interview as taking place on launch day and summarized the protocol's LP-protection and auction design.

evidence.title: Angstrom: Redefining the DEX
evidence.notes: Current first-party site links to the live trading and liquidity application and describes batch-auction and MEV-protection functions.

evidence.title: Angstrom v1 Whitepaper
evidence.notes: First-party technical paper documents Angstrom v1 and its market-design architecture.

evidence.title: Introducing Sorella
evidence.notes: Sorella identifies Angstrom as its Uniswap v4 hook designed to protect liquidity providers and swappers.
